title: Heritage tournament back in full swing
description: GEORGE NEWS - The annual George Local...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The annual George Local Football Association (Geolfa)  Heritage Tournament kicked off yesterday, Saturday 13 September, at different venues in George - Lawaaikamp Stadium, Maraiskamp Stadium (Parkdene) and Thembalethu  Stadium.

This tournament is one of the pre-season football festivals in George.


> Last year's finalists, Black Cats, and Simunye FC, both from Lawaaikamp, started the soccer fest with positive results after winning their first fixtures in the tournament.


A total of 32 teams are battling it out for the first prize of R15 000, second prize of R7 000, third prize of R4 000, fourth prize of R2 000 and from fifth to eighth place of R1 000.

Ngqanya Sonwabo of Young Masters on the ball.

Results: Saturday 13 September

- Celtics 2-0 Tigers
- Bangalore 2-1 France United
- Vuvuzela United 2-0 George United
- Abahlali 1-0 Silver Stars
- Black Cats 5-0 Young Masters
- All Sttars 1-1 Royal Blues
- Black Cats sec 2-0 Burning Fire
- Simunye 2-1 Inkonjane
- Paris United 3-0 Young Killers
- Madibaz 4-1 George Vultures
- Vista 1-1 George Celtics
- Burning Fire 1-0 Raul Stars
- Fast Eleven 3-0 Southern Academy
- Future Stars 0-0 Heaven Stars
- Eastern City 1-1 Rising Stars

Fanele Chele of Abahlali FC on the throw in.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
